title: carex lenticularis var. dolia
intro: Carex lenticularis var. dolia is a lesser-known variety of the Carex lenticularis plant, commonly referred to as the "blue pine sedge" or "blue pine sedge variety dolia," belonging to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of bloating and gas, making it a natural remedy for gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Carex lenticularis var. dolia include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help soothe and calm irritated tissues, as well as its potential to support immune function. Traditionally, Carex lenticularis var. dolia has been used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues and promote overall well-being.
